# Java 21 Upgrade Plan

## Overview
Upgrade PhotoAlbum-Java application to Java 21 LTS for enhanced performance, security, and access to modern language features.

## Tasks
See `tasks.json` for detailed task breakdown and execution tracking.

## Target Version
- **Java**: 21 (LTS)

## Key Benefits
- Long-term support and security updates
- Performance improvements from recent JVM enhancements
- Access to modern Java language features and APIs
- Improved tooling and ecosystem support
